productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates White Printed Pyjama Set
description: Style NoteWe love this cute pyjama set from little miss intimates which has a girly vibe and keeps you feeling young. Bright colours with cartoon prints, immensely comfortable and super soft fabric makes this just what you want to go to to sleep in or spend a day lounging at home. Product DetailsWhite spaghetti top, has a multicoloured printed binding around the arm holes and straps, graphic print on the chest in pink, yellow, black and blue, contrast pink stitched detail at the neckline and hem, round neckline. Red, yellow and blue printed designs on the shorts with elasticated waist and is tag-less.Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dry or iron on print
